name: darwinian
description: Agent skills for operating Darwinian Worker through the drwn CLI for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Agent skills wrapping the drwn CLI.
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap projects, manage one selected Worker and its Cards, author and share capability Cards, manage inventory and machine capabilities, and inspect or repair state with approval checkpoints.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap Darwinian Worker in this repo
Install the locked cards for this cloned project
Select a Worker for this project
Inspect why this skill is active
